title: Mellow Moist British Morcilla Victoria Sponge
description: A unique twist on the classic Victoria sponge, featuring morcilla and a low-fat friendly emulsified sauce, this dish is a tender and indulgent treat. It combines the richness of morcilla with the lightness of a traditional British sponge cake.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 180 degrees Celsius.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the self-raising flour, caster sugar, and crumbled morcilla.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the eggs, low-fat milk, and vanilla extract.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and mix until just combined.
Pour the mixture into two 20cm round cake tins and bake for 20 minutes.
Allow the cakes to cool completely before assembling the sponge.
To assemble, place one cake layer on a serving plate and spread a layer of emulsified sauce on top.
Place the second cake layer on top and dust with powdered sugar.
